name: contractor-auth
description: Generalized contractor-auth Cloudflare Worker. One codebase, deployed per contractor via wrangler env. Passkeys-first, magic-link fallback (disabled post-passkey). Forked from onboard-auth 2026-04-21.

scripts.deploy: echo 'use: npm run deploy:<slug>  (e.g. deploy:pasha)' && exit 1
